/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/api/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/parser/CommandRunner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/disk/BinaryIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/disk/MountManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MkDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/RmDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/FdDisk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MountCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/RepCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MkFsCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MkDirCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/MkFileCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/CatCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/ChmodCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/ChownCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/UserSessionCmds.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/Project2Cmds.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/commands/Ext3Cmds.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/fs/Ext2IO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/fs/Ext2Formatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/fs/Ext2Paths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/fs/FsFileOps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/fs/JournalManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mia_backend.dir/src/session/SessionManager.cpp.o -o mia_backend
